cards.title: Ask My AI
cards.description: Chat with an AI trained on my real experience and projects

paragraphs: For years, I've been documenting my journey. This space is where I share the intersection of my professional expertise and personal growth.
Using my authentic writings and reflections, you can explore my documented insights and experiences. While AI isn't perfect, I hope it will share my story as genuinely as possible.

chat.initialMessage: Hey there! 👋 I'm Ziv's AI assistant, I have access to his writings, and life insights. Feel free to ask and explore about his professional path or personal growth!
